fees_and_eligibility.overview: Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, M.Sc. and MCA. Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,70,000 to 8,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar goes up to 957.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to its M.Tech programs, Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, recognizes legitimate entrance exam results. Scores that match legitimate GATE, OJEE, and/or OJEE PGAT scores are regarded as accepted. CUET-PG scores are also accepted for admissions purposes. Following their selection based on those results, candidates will be given consideration for counseling in order to be assigned a seat. With an emphasis on both theoretical and practical skills in engineering and technology, the two-year M.Tech programme provides a variety of postgraduate specializations.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar for admission M.Tech.?

faqs.answer: A:    The admission to the B.Tech programs in Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, is through scores generated from the JEE Main and OJEE, the Odisha Joint Entrance Examination. Thereby, only good performances at these entrance tests would make students eligible for counseling and seat allotment. It emphasizes merit-based admission; only competitive examinations of these institutions supported students' selections. Admission also involves the counseling process conducted under OJEE, which makes the final choice of candidates for various engineering specializations presented at the institute.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements from 2019, but not good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is 75-80%. They secured job offers. The salary packages varied from year to year. The highest package till now is 32.5 LPA. The average package is 5.16 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Accenture, Capgemini, Amazon, DXC Technology, Deloitte, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, and IBM. 272 internship offers were made, with a stipend ranging from Rs. 8,000 - 60,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel but in some classrooms it is available. Hostel has AC and also non-AC rooms, a water cooler, washing machines, network routers, water heaters, etc. The quality of the mess and canteen food is not the best but good compared to other colleges. Doctors are available in the hostel for 1-2 days per week. Badminton courts are available in all hostels and other courts are available outside the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Above average, according to the fee, not bad.

review_content.Placements: Good, to be honest, considering the college fees are around Rs.12 lakhs, which might have increased now that it's a university, it's still pretty good for a tier 3 private college. Most people get placed. Only those with backlogs or poor academics don't get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite good for CSE students. We get AC rooms for CSE students from the 2nd to the 4th year, but ECE, EEE, and EIE students don't get AC rooms, as there are very few AC rooms in the ECE building. AC hostel rooms are good, with 24/7 electricity and water supply.

overview_faqs.question: Is Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar is a reputed institute for B.Tech, Ph.D., M.Sc., MCA, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 4.4 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Silicon Institute of Technology in Bhubaneswar is generally a good college, particularly with respect to the placements and faculty. The placement record of the college is pretty good with average packages ranging between INR 4 to 6 lakhs per annum and the highest package till date was somewhere around 32 lakhs per annum. Campus recruits continuously happen from TCS, Wipro, Tata Power, and the students have got an average placement of around 80-90 %.Students love the faculty and the atmosphere supportive of learning. Reviews, however, do reflect that infrastructure is lacking in a few of them. On the whole, however, the Silicon Institute of Technology is very much a decent institution where a student can take engineering studies. It is more favourable towards the engineering streams with respect to its training of students according to industry requirements.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: Admission to the Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar is relatively less problematic, mainly on the basis of rank acquired in OJEE or JEE Main. Candidates must have cleared Class 12 with subjects like Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry/Biology. Selection for admission is through online registration as well as counseling conducted by OJEE. Although this is merit-based, the competition varies from branch to branch. As a whole, however, it is accessible, but the rank needed to secure a seat has to be met.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar goes up to 957.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar for admission M.Tech.?
faqs.answer: For admission to its M.Tech programs, Silicon Institute of Technology, Bhubaneswar, recognizes legitimate entrance exam results. Scores that match legitimate GATE, OJEE, and/or OJEE PGAT scores are regarded as accepted. CUET-PG scores are also accepted for admissions purposes. Following their selection based on those results, candidates will be given consideration for counseling in order to be assigned a seat. With an emphasis on both theoretical and practical skills in engineering and technology, the two-year M.Tech programme provides a variety of postgraduate specializations.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Silicon Institute of Technology Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct admission is available at Silicon Institute of Technology (SIT) Bhubaneswar for certain categories of students, primarily through the Management Quota. Students who do not qualify through the Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) or the Odisha Joint Entrance Examination (OJEE) may still apply for management quota seats.

placement_data.title: Silicon Placement overview
paragraphs: Silicon Institute of Technology has successfully concluded its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2022. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered to BTech students during Silicon Institute of Technology placements 2022 stood at INR 33 LPA and 5.1 LPA. Further, the highest package offered to MCA and MSc Data Science students stood at INR 7.5 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively . The participating recruiters presented 1,080 job offers to BTech students and 135 jobs to MCA students during the placement process 2022. The top recruiters of the Silicon Institute of Technology in 2022 included Adani Group, JSW, Accenture, TCS, Amazon, Infosys , etc.

In addition to offering placement opportunities to the students, the placements wing of the college looks after the training of students on a continuing basis. In 2022, 221 internship offers were provided to the students of BTech course.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure of hostels and classrooms, and clean surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good and you can enjoy a lot. Free Wi-Fi is also available, and you can gain a lot of knowledge. The library is also there, which is a very peaceful and silent place where you can read books, and there are many magazines, so you can learn a lot.

reviews.review_heading: Strict about academics and good placement record.
reviews.review_text: The campus is small, and the infrastructure is good according to the campus size. Hostel rooms are clean and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements from 2019, but not good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel but in some classrooms it is available. Hostel has AC and also non-AC rooms, a water cooler, washing machines, network routers, water heaters, etc. The quality of the mess and canteen food is not the best but good compared to other colleges. Doctors are available in the hostel for 1-2 days per week. Badminton courts are available in all hostels and other courts are available outside the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Above average, according to the fee, not bad.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite good for CSE students. We get AC rooms for CSE students from the 2nd to the 4th year, but ECE, EEE, and EIE students don't get AC rooms, as there are very few AC rooms in the ECE building. AC hostel rooms are good, with 24/7 electricity and water supply.

reviews.review_heading: The disciplined environment and focus on students.
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure, with advanced equipment available for students in every laboratory. Hostels provide clean and hygienic food and washroom facilities. Our food menu is decided by students which is an extraordinary feature for students of Silicon. The campus is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi. Hostels provide comfortable accommodation with necessary amenities. However, some students have suggested improvements in medical facilities and food quality in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: A value for money, a return on investment, a strict, disciplined, and academically strong college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is small, with limited facilities in a small area. The authorities are strict, with strict rules. There is less campus life, and not many events take place. On a small campus, you do not know what you will enjoy. There are very few events and a smaller crowd, which can be good and bad. There is less social exposure, as students from other colleges don’t visit often. Although the campus is lush green, it is clean.

reviews.review_heading: As I invested more so, I got that much more. That is a placement that everyone needs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Well-equipped classrooms and labs are there for us. Each classroom has Wi-Fi installed, so there are no interruptions in the network. The library area is very calm and a proper environment for studying, with AC and non-AC rooms available as per the needs of students, along with Wi-Fi. Our hostels, for both boys and girls, have clean and hygienic rooms, corridors, and washrooms. Water and electricity are available 24/7. A lift is also installed, as ...

reviews.review_heading: My college life at Silicon university.
reviews.review_text: The college has nice infrastructure but the campus is \small or else the campus environment is so good. We have a central library and a Skylab where students can access free Wi-Fi. We have different academic buildings for computer science and engineering, electronics and communication engineering, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facilities, and studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are quite good. Hostel facilities are amazing, as many of my friends live in the hostel. The college organizes many events and sports for students to participate in and gain knowledge from. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Silicon University - Do join for studies and memories.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel, but it is available in the library, some classrooms, and Skylab. Food is average in the hostel. There are great opportunities for sports and games. College also has medical facilities. If you don't wish to eat in the canteen you can eat at the cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: Silicon Institute is a good institute with a comfortable environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel structure is pretty good with a lot of facilities like a gym, sports ground, etc. There are two types of hostels, One is AC and the other one is non-AC, and we can choose as we like. Wi-Fi is available everywhere and we can access it. Labs are quite good with well-managed desks and chairs. We can run our computer there. Classrooms are neat and clean. In the summer season, we get AC classrooms. Labs are good and have every equipment we need.

reviews.review_heading: A great place to learn about life, and you will grow as a human in this place.
reviews.review_text: Everything was available. Facilities were good. Hostel rooms were good, and you will enjoy them. Sports complex was there, focus on studies, and everything else was gonna be alright. Gym and other amenities were also available. Go for it, and it was worth it. I would recommend this to everyone. Sports were good and other clubs were nice.

reviews.review_heading: An amazing university where career is crafted.
reviews.review_text: College has a nice infrastructure with Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus and smart labs. Classrooms are also great in every aspect. College has a big common library for the students where there are various books to read and to do research about.

reviews.review_heading: Silicon University: A comprehensive review of education and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Silicon is modern and as per the needs of students. Campus has labs in various engineering departments. Classrooms are spacious. There is a dedicated exam hall, training hall, skill development, and many more. The college library is well stocked by good collection of books, research papers, and journals. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus. Two canteens, serving vegetarian and non-vegetarian food, and one cafeteria are available on campus. Food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facility and studies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are excellent in the college. I think it lacks medical facilities; other than that, it is amazing. The facilities in the hostel are amazing, but the quality of food available in the mess and canteen can be improved. The infrastructure for sports and games is very good.

highlights.summary: Admissions are open to all the courses. Interested candidates can apply by visiting the official college website.

college_info.intro:
Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur offers UG and PG courses across Nursing, Medical Sciences, and others. BSc and BOptom are popular courses offered at MMU Sadopur. The university offers a full-time, four-year BSc programme at the UG level. The BSc programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Nursing, Medical Radiography & Imaging Technology, Operation Theatre Technology, Medical Lab Technology, Cardio Vascular Technology, and others.
Below mentioned are Maharishi Markandeshwar University's popular programmes:
For more information check out the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology and English with at least 50% aggregate can apply for MMU Sadopur B.Optm programme. The selection for B.Optm is based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Optm at MMU Sadopur?

faqs.answer: A:    The minimum age to apply for BSc at MMU Sadopur is 17 years or more as on December 31, of the admission year. Besides, aspirants must also complete Class 12 or equivalent examination in relevant subjects to apply for MMU Sadopur BSc courses.
faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply for B.Sc at MMU Sadopur?

faqs.answer: A:    MMU or Maharishi Markandeshwar University Sadopur specifies the eligibility requirement for each programme. Candidates who fulfil the course-specific requirement can apply for the preferred course. Below is course-wise eligibility for MMU Sadopur:CourseCommon EligibilityBScClass 12 in relevant subjectsMScGraduationGNMClass 12 with English with at least 40% aggregateBPTClass 12 with English and a minimum of 50% in Science with Physics, Chemistry,  Biology as mandatory subjects (45% aggregate in case of reserved category)B.OptomClass 12 with Physics,  Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology and English with at least 50% aggregateMHAGraduation with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST category)

review_content.Placements: Nearly about 10% of the students get placements. Only 1-2 companies visit for interviews or may not visit sometime. Overall I am dissatisfied with the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The room and facilities are good. A room is allowed to 2 students. Medical facilities are not provided. Sports on campus are officially not organised frequently. Wi-Fi is available but is not working properly and there are network issues always. Availability of books is very disappointed for all time. But food quality is average.
review_content.Faculty: Staff is good and helpful up to their level but the management is not helping students properly after admission. It is fine for every small problem. No campus tours and visits are held. Major problem of all the is to maintain 75% of attandence in all subjects.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with everything which our college provides us.

review_content.Placements: Almost 52% of the students got placed in our semester. The salary offered is Rs. 15,000 to 50,000 per month. Nestle, Pulsus and Abryl are the companies for placements. Almost 100% of the students got an internship in top reputed companies. Top roles offered to the students are in industrial, quality assurance, medical journal and many others.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is up to date and good. It is a good university, and it is providing infinite opportunities to its students. It is the best for education and mainly for practical propose. I am highly satisfied to be a part of this university. It was an amazing experience, and it was worth spending four years of my life on this campus.

faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur offers courses at UG, PG and Diploma levels in Science, Nursing, and other streams. The university offers BSc, BPT, B.Optm at the UG level and MSc, MHA at the PG level. Candidates have to pay some amount of the tuition fees to confirm their admission.

individual_reviews.title: MM Institute of Nursing and Research.

content.Placements: The college provides a better education than most M.Ed. colleges. After the course, they provide internships in their own hospital for the students' good experience, so that they can get high-paying jobs in the future. The hospital infrastructure is also good.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is also good. They provide a room for two students with two almirahs and an attached bathroom. The Wi-Fi service is also best, and the food here in the mess is also good, but they can do better in that. The canteen area is also good with beautiful decorations.

individual_reviews.title: Good cost to study facility.

content.Placements: About 90% of students are placed in Bachelor of architecture courses. The highest package was 3.5 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 2.75 LPA. Larsen and turbo, Tata construction, Sikka associates, etc. About100% of students got internships in our course. The top roles offered are architecture assistant and associate architect.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and very good lecture halls and theaters, the quality of food are above average in mess and canteen, overall infrastructure and labs are very good to go, Wi-Fi is of good quality little bit glitch sometimes but that is nearly negligible, the library is very good quite equipped with quite a room.

Wi-Fi is available but is not working properly and there are network issues always. Availability of books is very disappointed for all time. But food quality is average.

The university offers admission to most of the courses based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission at MMU. Below-mentioned are theMaharishi Markandeshwar University coursesalong with eligibility criteria and selection criteria:

The university offers admissions through the online mode. Candidates have to fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements for admission in the university. Below are the steps to get a seat in MMU Sadopur:
Step 1: MMU Sadopur Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for the preferred programme. Aspirants have to first register with the basic details to generate login credentials and then fill out the application form.
Step 2: Selection

The selection for UG, PG and diploma courses is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. The university reviews the applications of the aspirants to confirm their eligibility for admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, the university informs the candidates about their admission. Shortlisted aspirants have to pay theMMU Sadopur feeto confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: MMU Sadopur BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MMU Sadopur offers a four-year BSc course divided into eight semesters. The course includes one-year clinical training/ internship. The university offers BSc in various specialisations such as Nursing, Medical Radiography & Imaging Technology, Perfusion Technology, Operation Theatre Technology, etc. Candidates must complete a minimum of Class 12 in relevant subjects to apply for the BSc programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for admission to B.Sc Nursing at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Class 12 or equivalent examination with 12 years of schooling with at least five subjects including Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates) to apply for MMU Sadopur BSc Nursing programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Which B.Sc specialisations does MMU Sadopur offer?
faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur offers a four-year BSc programme divided into eight semesters. Aspirants need to complete Class 12 in relevant subjects to apply for the preferred BSc specialisation. Below are the BSc specialisations offered at MMU Sadopur:NursingMedical Radiography & Imaging TechnologyPerfusion TechnologyOperation Theatre Technology, etc.

faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply for B.Sc at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: The minimum age to apply for BSc at MMU Sadopur is 17 years or more as on December 31, of the admission year. Besides, aspirants must also complete Class 12 or equivalent examination in relevant subjects to apply for MMU Sadopur BSc courses.

faqs.question: When is MMU Sadopur BSc admission confirmed?
faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur BSc admission is confirmed when candidates have completed the necessary document verification and paid the some amount of the tuition fee. The total tuition fee of the BSc programme ar MMU Sadopur is INR 1.6 Lakh. Candidates applying for admission into the programme will have to pay that in addition to the admission fee of the institute.

courses_data.name: MMU Sadopur GNM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MMU Sadopur offers a three-year GNM Nursing course. The selection for GNM is based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with English individually from any recognised board can apply for GNM Nursing. Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with English with at least 40% aggregate in vocational ANM course can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to apply for GNM at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with English and have obtained a minimum of 40% aggregate in the qualifying exam are eligible to apply for MMU Sadopur GNM course. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with English with at least 40% aggregate in vocational ANM course are also eligible to apply.Besides, aspirants who have completed Class 12 with at least 40% aggregate in Vocational Stream-Health care Science can also apply for GNM programme.

faqs.question: What is the duration of GNM at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur offers GNM for a duration of three years . Admission to GNM course is based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants need to complete Class 12 with English individually from any recognised board can apply for GNM Nursing.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for GNM at MMU Sadopur?
faqs.answer: MMU Sadopur selects candidates for GNM based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Besides, the minimum qualification required for GNM is Class 12 with English with at least 40% aggregate. Once selected, aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

reviews.review_heading: MM Institute of Nursing and Research.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is also good. They provide a room for two students with two almirahs and an attached bathroom. The Wi-Fi service is also best, and the food here in the mess is also good, but they can do better in that. The canteen area is also good with beautiful decorations.

reviews.review_heading: Good cost to study facility.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and very good lecture halls and theaters, the quality of food are above average in mess and canteen, overall infrastructure and labs are very good to go, Wi-Fi is of good quality little bit glitch sometimes but that is nearly negligible, the library is very good quite equipped with quite a room.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of management and their way of working .
reviews.review_text: The room and facilities are good. A room is allowed to 2 students. Medical facilities are not provided. Sports on campus are officially not organised frequently. Wi-Fi is available but is not working properly and there are network issues always. Availability of books is very disappointed for all time. But food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with everything which our college provides us.
reviews.review_text: Everything is up to date and good. It is a good university, and it is providing infinite opportunities to its students. It is the best for education and mainly for practical propose. I am highly satisfied to be a part of this university. It was an amazing experience, and it was worth spending four years of my life on this campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good college and they also provide quality of education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and we also have the right to use college resource like Wi-Fi, and classrooms are good. The library is well defined. The infrastructure of the college is good. In the hostel, rooms are good, and they provide air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned room as well. The quality of the food served is good, and they also conduct some sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a very good college for architecture students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college are average. Wi-Fi does not work properly, and the internet speed is very low. Classrooms are large but very uncomfortable. Sports and other additional activities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the quality of education. Dissatisfied with the placements & infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This college has the average infrastructure. The hostel and medical facilities are not good in campus. Wi-fi connectivity, sports and games facility is average. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is very bad. Hostel rooms are good with attached washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college because of faculty members and Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of MM University is really aesthetic. We have two big buildings and classrooms are well furnished with AC. Our college also have football ground. Furthermore, the library is also have several books rather than just course books which help the student to gather outside information also.

reviews.review_heading: The college mainly focuses on practical knowledge than the theoretical one.
reviews.review_text: The college has an excellent campus and infrastructure. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are proper labs and field area for practical work. Gym facilities are also available here. Cleanliness in our university is the best. Rooms are well ventilated. Buildings are well-equipped. There are 4 huge grounds for sports and other activities.

The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

review_content.General: They have good infrastructure and good surroundings. The girls’ hostel is near the college. Wi-Fi is available. Smart classrooms are available. Each class has different types of bench desks, chair desks, or sets of chairs and tables. Staff are very punctual, and labs are good. The library is available with books for every subject recommended in the syllabus and other medical-related books. There are many advanced plans to increase the library infrastructure. Hostels have facilities. The boys’ hostel is not nearby, but college bus facilities are available. Mess facilities and stores are available.

reviews_list.review_title: It has absolutely good infrastructure and placements for the future.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 students in our batch. There are well-experienced teachers in college, so there is a possibility for every student to pass exams. It is a good college with high certificate value. It is the best course for the future in India and foreign countries.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are good labs in college. There are at least four labs for each subject and a prayer hall for both girls and boys separately. There is free Wi-Fi in the college for teachers and students. There is a library for every student for free. All classrooms have a projector.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure, facilities, faculty members, and other activities.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of passed-out students got placed in top companies as a pharmacist abroad, quality assurance officer, drug inspector, and other posts in pharmaceutical industries. Most internships are provided to join as a pharmacist. Our college provides for each batch a different uniform with aprons, black shoes, belts, and Also have uniformity with chair cuttings ..

review_summary.college_name: Malik Deenar College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharm. in Pharmacognosy and Phytochemistry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Students interested in studying with a positive vibe are satisfied. Teacher interaction is perfect.

content.Placements: 99% get 2–3 LPA. Lectures from every college also recruit in this college. It is better than graduation in Mangalore (Life Pharmacy). 100% plant studies are available. Careers include research, professor or assistant professor, research scientist, and regulatory affairs specialist. Along with quality control assurance officer, clinical research associate, hospital or clinical pharmacist, and others like pharmaceutical production, industries, and medical writing.
content.Infrastructure: They have good infrastructure and good surroundings. The girls’ hostel is near the college. Wi-Fi is available. Smart classrooms are available. Each class has different types of bench desks, chair desks, or sets of chairs and tables. Staff are very punctual, and labs are good. The library is available with books for every subject recommended in the syllabus and other medical-related books. There are many advanced plans to increase the library infrastructure. Hostels have facilities. The boys’ hostel is not nearby, but college bus facilities are available. Mess facilities and stores are available.

individual_reviews.title: It has absolutely good infrastructure and placements for the future.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in our batch. There are well-experienced teachers in college, so there is a possibility for every student to pass exams. It is a good college with high certificate value. It is the best course for the future in India and foreign countries.
content.Infrastructure: There are good labs in college. There are at least four labs for each subject and a prayer hall for both girls and boys separately. There is free Wi-Fi in the college for teachers and students. There is a library for every student for free. All classrooms have a projector.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure, facilities, faculty members, and other activities.

content.Placements: Around 90% of passed-out students got placed in top companies as a pharmacist abroad, quality assurance officer, drug inspector, and other posts in pharmaceutical industries. Most internships are provided to join as a pharmacist. Our college provides for each batch a different uniform with aprons, black shoes, belts, and Also have uniformity with chair cuttings ..
content.Infrastructure: In our college, classrooms, labs, and library facilities are available. It should provide good and hygienic facilities. Canteens are available with fresh juices, vegetarian, and non-vegetarian food. Medical facilities are available including first-aid, emergency medicines, and common diseases medicines.

individual_reviews.title: Absol satisfied beacuse of good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: No placements, Better facilities, Good infrastructure and campus. Principal and vice principal are cool enough to share our concerns about studies and academics. Hostel facility available for both girls and boys near Seethangoli town. Ragging is strictly prohibited.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility available but inaccessible for students. Labs are available with a neat and cool environment. Classrooms are sufficiently smart with digital TV and a Dolby sound system. The library is highly useful for referencing all the textbooks. The canteen is open 24 hours.

highlights.summary: The KCET 2026 registration window for admission to the BE/BTech course is now closed. The KCET exam 2026 will be held on Apr 23 and Apr 24, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. It keeps us updated on vacancies. Most of the students who passed out this year are currently working in hospitals and research fields. Students got pharmacovigilance posts. The salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very small. We have well-maintained laboratories. Classrooms are spacious. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. They have wardens and securities. Hostels have strict timings. We have to follow them.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: In our college, students get placed in very good pharmaceutical and medicine production companies like Cipla, Supreem Pharmaceuticals, etc., and other medical supplies with a starting salary package of 3 LPA. Many students joined pharmaceutical stores like Apollo and MedPlus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nargund College of Pharmacy is located near to main road and bus stop. CCTV cameras are provided in every classroom for safety. The library books are free to use. The food served in the canteen and mess is very tasty and hygienic at a low cost. The hostel has a separate building with needed facilities. Games are conducted as per the university schedule.

reviews_list.review_title: Very bad college, teaching is not that much good.

review_content.Placements: College is good for teaching but placements are very poor in our college. Last year only 2 companies came to offer job, but no one was selected.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, also library is available for students. Classrooms are good, but not that much excellent. Cleaning is good in college, but there is no proper facilities for toilet. Also infrastructure is not that much good. Wi-Fi is only for final year students.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified for us, teaching is average. Exam is of annual pattern, 3 sessional which are held in whole year and 1 final exam, and exams are very hard to clear, study is mandatory for passing. 50% marks are needed for passing in Pharma.D course, and after completing Pharma.D we will get Dr. Degree.

review_summary.college_name: Nargund College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: The principal and staff are good, but there is a need for further improvement in infrastructure.

content.Placements: 30-40% of students got placement, with an average package of 20-30,000 offered. Top recruiters include IQVIA, CELLCAL, Torrent Pharma, Cipla, Sun Pharma, Micro Lab, and Dr. Reddy. 90% of students got internships with companies like Micro Lab, Juggat Pharma, Overseas, KAPL, Cipla, and Srusti Pharmaceutical. Top roles include MR, clinical research associate, clinical research coordinator, drug safety associate, junior QA, junior QC, hospital pharmacist, community pharmacist, and clinical pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for students, only for staff. Labs are average, I think they can improve more so that they meet the standards and have more equipment and instruments. The classroom is also average, with a green board and projector. The college does have a playground where students can play games like volleyball, football, and other sports. The library has been reviewed properly to check which books are available for every semester and introduce new books for the students according to PCI approval.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Almost everyone from my batch is placed in different companies and hospitals. The highest package is around 3 lakhs per annum and the lowest is around 1.5 lakhs per annum. Everyone got internships in different pharmaceutical companies, industries, hospitals and labs.
content.Infrastructure: The main college building and the girls hostel are connected, and there is a separate boys hostel. The canteen is common for both and is situated separately. Labs are some of the best ones I've seen. Also, there is a nano-molecular lab in this college, which is not available in many colleges. There is a library. Wifi is available. There is no specific common room, but sports are encouraged.

content.Placements: College is good for teaching but placements are very poor in our college. Last year only 2 companies came to offer job, but no one was selected.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, also library is available for students. Classrooms are good, but not that much excellent. Cleaning is good in college, but there is no proper facilities for toilet. Also infrastructure is not that much good. Wi-Fi is only for final year students.
content.Faculty: Teachers are highly qualified for us, teaching is average. Exam is of annual pattern, 3 sessional which are held in whole year and 1 final exam, and exams are very hard to clear, study is mandatory for passing. 50% marks are needed for passing in Pharma.D course, and after completing Pharma.D we will get Dr. Degree.

hostel_campus.college_name: Nargund College of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The principal and staff are good, but there is a need for further improvement in infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for students, only for staff. Labs are average, I think they can improve more so that they meet the standards and have more equipment and instruments. The classroom is also average, with a green board and projector. The college does have a playground where students can play games like volleyball, football, and other sports. The library has been reviewed properly to check which books are available for every semester and introduce new books for the students according to PCI ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The main college building and the girls hostel are connected, and there is a separate boys hostel. The canteen is common for both and is situated separately. Labs are some of the best ones I've seen. Also, there is a nano-molecular lab in this college, which is not available in many colleges. There is a library. Wifi is available. There is no specific common room, but sports are encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very small. We have well-maintained laboratories. Classrooms are spacious. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. They have wardens and securities. Hostels have strict timings. We have to follow them.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nargund College of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: Nargund College of Pharmacy is located near to main road and bus stop. CCTV cameras are provided in every classroom for safety. The library books are free to use. The food served in the canteen and mess is very tasty and hygienic at a low cost. The hostel has a separate building with needed facilities. Games are conducted as per the university schedule.

reviews.review_heading: Very bad college, teaching is not that much good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24/7, also library is available for students. Classrooms are good, but not that much excellent. Cleaning is good in college, but there is no proper facilities for toilet. Also infrastructure is not that much good. Wi-Fi is only for final year students.

reviews.review_heading: Students like to participate in different activities or sports they can avoid it.
reviews.review_text: As honest, the college is good in labs but not have good management. Hostel is cheap and good have daily cleaning facility as well. College is not providing Wi-Fi for hostel. Library is good and have all the pharma books. Classroom are good and have advance teaching facility. College don't have any campus facility. The mess is good. College don't have any playground. Overall average .

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not good. The transportation facilities are not available. The library and labs are available. Hostel facilities are good, and we will get good food from time to time. Sports and games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Labs don't have required equipment and chemicals, and the library has a less number of books.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but passwords are regularly changed, labs and classrooms are average, there is no ground for sports or parking vehicles. The hostel is average but the food is the worst, and sports and games happen only once a year with improper surveillance and management.

reviews.review_heading: Our infrastructure is not good and it needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was enabled. Laboratories, classrooms, and a library were available in this college. Our campus was not big. Sports were also not available. But a sports team was available and students play university games, students can also make their team and participate in other colleges that will be full support from the management side so students can find easily. Hostel facilities were good in this college. There was no campus, and sports were also not available.

reviews.review_heading: Average placement and nice infrastructure. Overall nice experience.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were somehow good. The college has Wi-Fi though it is not for students. The Labs were well-equipped and has a nice environment for conducting practical experiments Classrooms are at its best equipped with projector. And library are also bundled with books. But Hostel was in the average state as we encountered scarcity of water but overall it was average. Canteen food was not up to the mark but somehow manageable. Sports & games were conducted. Annual Sports Meet every year was a  ...

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Palamuru University popular programmes are MBA and MSc. MBA students are placed in top companies such as ISR Space, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, The Orchid, HCL, Trident, and others. Palamuru University MBA students can become Managers and Leaders or can change their careers as per their interests. MSc students are taught Inorganic Chemistry, Organic Chemistry, Physical Chemistry, and several other subjects.
Palamuru University is one of the top universities present in India. Palamuru University Kollapur MBA course is offered in three specialisations, namely Human Resource (HR), Finance, and Marketing. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Palamuru University and their respective eligibility and Palamuru University fee structure:

faqs.question: How are B.Sc placements at Palamuru University?

faqs.answer: A:    The palamuru university which is located in mahabubnagar provide various courses like B.Sc, M.Sc and all UG and PG courses. The no.of seats available in B.Sc course at palamuru university is 180. The class size is also 180 members you can get a seat through is 10+2 marks.
faqs.question: How many students can do B.Sc at Palamuru University?

faqs.answer: A:    The Palamuru University is located in Mahabubnagar and it offers various UG courses for students. The different courses have different fee structures.For example to do MCA the fee structure is INR 1.76 Lakhs for 4 years. For an MBA you need to pay INR 27,050 for year. For M.Sc course you need to pay 32,600 per year. For MA the fee is 23,600 per year. For B.Sc + M.Sc you need to pay 32,600 for every year. For M.ED the fee structure is 62,600 per year. for the M.SW course the fee structure is INR 23,600 per year.
faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Palamuru University?

faqs.answer: A:    Palamuru University attendance rules are mentioned below:The minimum attendance of students for Theory courses and various practicals shall be 80% and 90% for the field attachmentIn special cases the Vice- Chancellor may accept the deficiency of attendance which is not exceeding 10% only on the recommendation of the Principal. This decision is basis the Medical certificate which is authorised by the Medical Officer. If students have low attendance they may be stopped from giving the exam.
faqs.question: What happens if I have low attendance in class at Palamuru University?

faqs.answer: A:    You can get a seat in Palamauru University for B.Sc, if you get 75 percentile in CPGET. Based on the reservation system you cannot get a seat, but if you are a student who belongs to sc/st caste you can get a seat easily by getting 75 percentile in CPGET. If you are a student from other castes or BC, then the seat allotment is given based on more percentile and cut off of the college. In 2023 cut-off the students with 75 percentile got seats.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college and faculty.

review_content.Placements: Maximum percentage of students were placed in our course. 10 LPA was the highest package, 6 LPA was the average package, and 3.5 LPA was the lowest package. TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, and Accenture are the top recruiters for our course. 50% of the students are secured with internships in Cisco and IBM. Software Developer, Data Analyst, FullStack web Developer, and Business Analyst roles are offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are usually spacious, they often come with modern equipments. The laboratories are equipped with modern equipments. Good internet connectivity is provided to the students. In hostel, the food quality is good along with comfortable rooms being available.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college and faculty.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students are placed in our course. 6 LPA is the highest package, 4 LPA is the average package, and 3 LPA is the lowest package in our course. TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Deloitte companies are recruiting for our course. No one can get an internship in our course; teacher, analyst, and chemist roles are offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, and our college environment is also good. Classrooms are also good; in our college, we have one library. Our college hostel facility is also good, and the food quality is also good. There is no medical facility at our college. Our college has a playground. There is a limited sports facility. We enjoy it.

These courses are offered across fields of Medicine & Health Sciences and Teaching & Education, etc. They are available at the UG and PG levels. faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not possible for B.Ed at Palamuru University. As per the information collated from various sources, the university accepts a valid score of TSEd CET exam. This exam is conducted by Mahatma Gandhi University, Nalgonda on behalf of the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE). Only candidates having a valid TSEd CET score will be shortlisted by the university for the course.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to B.Ed at Palamuru University?

faqs.answer: Palamuru University accepts the scores of various entrance exams for admission to its courses. For undergraduate and postgraduate courses, the university accepts the OUPGCET and TSEAMCET entrance exam scores. Specifically, the OUCET Exam is used for selecting students for PG admission, while the TSICET entrance exam is the basis for admission to MBA programs at Palamuru University.

individual_reviews.title: Great practical exposure, but needs an updated curriculum.

content.Placements: There are 50+ students. 70% of them get placements every year in good pharma companies like Hetero, Milan, and Aurobindo. Some provide good packages for the freshers in starting so I rate it 4 about the placements in our college.
content.Infrastructure: Most of the students like girls live in the hostel. It has good facilities like Wi-Fi, good ventilation, good maintenance, and also has good and tasty food available at your time. They also provide lunch boxes for the students who go to college daily.

individual_reviews.title: Good and senior faculty and good campus and extracurricular sports .

content.Placements: The campus placements takes places every year where 80% students get jobs with good package in top companies like Aurobindo, Hetero etc. It is good to join the college and get placements. Here we can get new friends and there will be a lot of connections.
content.Infrastructure: The is no college hostel but the course subjects and the staff explanations are too good. Every Friday there will be yoga classes for students health purpose, where all the student should be taken care in the auditorium and it feels very good to join this college .

admission_overview.college_name: Palamuru University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: Palamuru University admission 2025isentrance-based.Located in Telangana, Palamuru University is a state-level University. It offers a total of19courses at UG and PG levels, along with aPhDprogramme in various specialisations. Palamuru University admission is available in theofflineandOnlinemode. Admission to all the programmes (excluding MSW) is based on a candidate’s valid score in the respectiveentrance examaccepted byPalamuru University.
Students of the University are placed in companies like Hetero Labs Ltd., Symed Labs Ltd., Chaitanya School, MSN Pharma Labs, IOCL, Vodafone, Honda, Google, etc.

Palamuru University offers 19 courses with various specialisations to interested candidates. The courses are offered in the regular/full-time mode. People can apply through the DOST portal online for their desired course. The courses are offered at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral course levels. Learn more through the highlights table below:

Palamuru University admission process for its programs may differ upon their respective stream. The university accepts various entrance exams for admission. Here are some important admission requirements forPalamuru University courses:
Eligibility
Minimum 45% aggregate in Class 12 from a recognised board
At least 50% in Class 12 from a recognised board, and 40% in graduation
Minimum 50% aggregate in graduation
Minimum 50% aggregate in graduation
TS PGECET/GPAT
Postgraduation with relevant subjects

The courses at Palamuru University are offered at different course fees. The course fee varies with different course levels, specialisations, and programmes. Candidates who have been shortlisted by the admission process are eligible to pay the course fee. The total number of seats and Palamuru University fees are given below:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee and seat intake are taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

Candidates wishing to apply to the Palamuru University courses must follow the admission process in order to secure a seat in their desired course. There are more than 15 courses on offer by Palamuru University in the admission session of 2025. Candidates must apply for the course through the application form on the portal. Given below are the steps for the admission process :
Step 1: Palamuru University Application Process 2025

Candidates wishing to apply for the UG courses must apply for their desired course through the Degree Online Services Telangana (DOST) portal. Candidates must fill in the required personal and academic details. Candidates must pay the required application fee of INR 200 to successfully register for the course.
Step 2: Verification Process

Candidates must appear for the verification process that is conducted by the university. Candidature is authenticated through the process of document verification. Candidates must keep with themselves their required documents, such as Class 10 and Class 12 marksheets.
Step 3: Seat Allotment

Candidates who have cleared the admission process become eligible to pay the course fee and secure their seat in their desired course. Candidates can proceed to attend the regular classes once they have started.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Palamuru University for admission?
faqs.answer: Palamuru University accepts the scores of various entrance exams for admission to its courses. For undergraduate and postgraduate courses, the university accepts the OUPGCET and TSEAMCET entrance exam scores. Specifically, the OUCET Exam is used for selecting students for PG admission, while the TSICET entrance exam is the basis for admission to MBA programs at Palamuru University.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Palamuru University directly?
faqs.answer: Palamuru University offers various courses at the uG and PG levels. Candidates seeking admission to these courses must participate in the admission process 2025. The admission can be either entrance based or merit-based depending upon the course. Candidates cannot get direct admission to the courses that require entrance exams. The courses that accept entrance exams are: MBA, MSc, BPharma, MA, MSW, etc.Candidates to the above mentioned courses are shortlisted on the basis of their entrance scores in addition to the information provided on the application form.

faqs.question: Does Palamuru University accept CPGET score?
faqs.answer: Yes, palamura University ( university located in the Indian state of Telangana ) accept CPGET score it is a state level entrance test, stands for common post graduate entrance test for admission to various postgraduate programs like integrated M.Sc, M.A, M.Sc, M.Com, MSW, M.Ed.

faqs.question: How many students can do B.Sc at Palamuru University?
faqs.answer: The palamuru university which is located in mahabubnagar provide various courses like B.Sc, M.Sc and all UG and PG courses. The no.of seats available in B.Sc course at palamuru university is 180. The class size is also 180 members you can get a seat through is 10+2 marks.

paragraphs: nbsp;As per the NIRF report 2024 released by Palamuru University, the median package offered during UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.85 LPA and INR 3.3 LPA , respectively. Earlier, the University has released the NIRF report 2023. According to the report, 18 UG 4-years and 65 PG 2-years students were placed during Palamuru University placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to UG 4-years and PG 2-years students during Palamuru University placements 2022 was INR 3.75 and INR 3.20 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of Palamuru University during the past years included Wipro, Tech Mahindra, The Orchid, ISR Space, HCL, Trident , etc.

faqs.question: How costly is Palamuru University?
faqs.answer: Palamuru University established in 2008, by State Government it is located in mahabub nagar. faqs.question: How costly is Palamuru University for MBA course?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Palamuru University MBA ranges between INR 53,400 and INR 54,000. The fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat in the university. Apart from tuition fee, there are other components also included in the course fee. In the start, candidates also require to pay an application fee to register for a course. The application fee for MBA is INR 700.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Palamuru University?
faqs.answer: The Palamuru University is located in Mahabubnagar and it offers various UG courses for students. The different courses have different fee structures.For example to do MCA the fee structure is INR 1.76 Lakhs for 4 years. For an MBA you need to pay INR 27,050 for year. For M.Sc course you need to pay 32,600 per year. For MA the fee is 23,600 per year. For B.Sc + M.Sc you need to pay 32,600 for every year. For M.ED the fee structure is 62,600 per year. for the M.SW course the fee structure is INR 23,600 per year.

faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Ed at Palamuru University?
faqs.answer: As per the unofficial sources, Palamuru University B.Ed fees ranges between INR 5,800 - INR 70,000. This fee range contains the tuition fee for both the years of the course. The tuition fee is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, is indicative. Aspirants need to pay the course fee after completion of the selection rounds to confirm their seat in the university. Apart from tuition fee, there are other components also included in the course fee.

faqs: What is the cut off of Palamuru University?
description: Palamuru University cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Palamuru University TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 44923 and 74489 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the same stood at 53054.

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 44923, 69411 and 74489, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Palamuru University. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

TS ICET is a state-level exam conducted by Kakatiya University Warangal, on behalf of the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) for admission to MBA and MCA programmes in Universities/ institutes situated in Telangana. Below mentioned are the steps to register for TS ICET Counselling 2023:

The Palamuru University MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 18890. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 11543, and the 2023 cutoff was 22153 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dr. R. G. Bhoyar Group of Institutions provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 12,000 to 3,43,268. UG programs include B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. Further, the PG programs include MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA.

reviews_list.review_title: I am really satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements offered in 2020.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 90 students studied in our course. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA to 6 LPA. Nearly 40% of the students got internships from our course in various companies like Cipla, Sun Pharma, Lupin and Glenmark Pharma.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our course are very good. The library area is also good and very clean, and books are available. Wi-Fi is also available in our department, and some practical lab facilities are good. Sports and games are really good, and every year I participate in sports and games.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in our area and the placements are absolutely great.

review_content.Placements: The highest package in the internship package is 7 lacs/year and the lowest is 4 lacs/ year. 60% of students are eligible for internships. Science labs, computer labs and technician labs are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in our institute. It is the best college and the wifi is available as well. Smart and highly professional labs are available in the college. The library is huge.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are qualified and the lab assistants in the college are attentive as well. All the difficulties are solved by the teachers. The college conducts semester exams.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Virohan: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University Faridabad are BSc and BSc Honours. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG level. Further, the college offers these programmes to provide students with theoretical and practical knowledge. Virohan LVU Faridabad courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry.
The BSc programme offered at the college covers core courses in the areas of MLT, OTT, HA, Optometry, MRIT, etc. Students additionally receive training in English Language & Power Skills Learning, which includes aspects like communication, personality development, digital literacy, and more. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Virohan Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University Faridabad, in the table provided below:

placements.overview: Virohan: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University, Faridabad assists students with placement and maintained a 98% placement rate. The institute is visited by top companies for placements such as Medanta, Clove Dental, Apollo Hospitals, Dr. Lal Path Labs, Healthians, Flebo, and others. Over the years, the college has trained over 10,000 students and has over 2,000 placement partners. The students get up to INR 50,000 starting salary. The below-mentioned are Virohan: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University, Faridabad placement statistics:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Virohan: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University, Faridabad offers undergraduate courses to students. Virohan offers Bachelor’s degree such as BSc courses. BSc specialisations include BSc in OTT, MLT, Radiology, and HA. Apart from this, the Institute offers BSc (Hons.) in MLT, and HA. In addition to this, Virohan: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University, Faridabad offers Bachelor in AOTT, and MRIT. At last, the Institute offers OPTOM in full-time mode.

paragraphs: Virohan: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University, Faridabad, admission processincludes multiple steps. To get admission, applicants need to follow all the steps. Admission to all the courses is merit-based. Check below the steps to get a seat in the institute:
1: Application Process

Applicants looking for admission to Virohan: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University, Faridabad, in any of the offered courses need to apply on the official website of the college. The admission counsellor contact the registered candidate.
2: Selection Rounds

The selection process is entirely eligibility-based, considering Class 12 Academic Performance, Stream & Age. The selected student have to submit their scorecard or sheet during course registration.Registration Modes: Online or offline (before, during and after the campus visit)Registration Fee: INR 5,000
3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

The institute informs the candidates about their selection. Candidates need to get their documents verified. Shortlisted candidates need to pay theVirohan: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth University, Faridabad feesto confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Is the University College of Engineering Osmania University BTech fee the same for specialised branches?

faqs.answer:
A:    University College of Technology, Osmania University has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates must have completed 17 years of age as on 31st December of the year of admission and an upper age limit of 22 years for all the candidates and 25 years in respect of Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe candidates as on 31st December of the year of Admissions.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Chemical Engg. from any recognised University/Institute.M.PharmaCandidate must have completed B.Pharma from any recognised University/Institute.

review_summary.college_name: Osmania University College of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has resources, but it's the students' responsibility to use them properly.

content.Placements: 30-80% of students are placed depending on job availability and the number of students meeting the eligibility criteria. The highest package is 7.5 LPA and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Pinnacle, NFC, IICT, and L&T. More than 90% of students are provided internships, which are important for the curriculum and have credit. Top roles could be head of operations in a factory or process design engineer in a company, and the pay scale usually increases with experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is huge but a little old. Classrooms are big enough to accommodate students properly. Facilities like Wi-Fi and the library are good. The library has all the books related to the course and curriculum, and even more information than required. One can work on advanced projects if the library is utilized properly. The hostel infrastructure is not great. The rooms are neat, but the number of people in a room is more than needed; a room for 5 is shared by 6 people. Sports and games facilities are not bad; there are a lot of big grounds to play on, but finding teams and people to play with might be a challenge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Textile Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college with good experience .

content.Placements: 60 percent of students were placed in our course. The highest package was 7 lacs, and the lowest package was 4 lacs. Jockey and some others are the top recruiters. The college has different courses, like chemical engineering, food technology and textile technology.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities services in our course is good and we also have all the things we needs in college and Wi-Fi in hostel. Also, we have grounds for sports, a gym, etc. Food is good in hostel and also in canteen. We have health care centre and hospital at university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Textile Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review for textile technology at Osmania College of Technology.

content.Placements: I am from Textile Technology and my batch consists of 23 people out of which 5 are placed at Welspun industries. Aditya birla fashion and Retail is in pipeline now and some student interviews are done. Coming to internships all 23 did internships at different reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: The course is pretty good and the faculty is amazing tier skills teaching are appreciable. The head of the department is always supportive of students and works for our welfare of us. The hostel is not at all good, we have water and electricity issues. I don't recommend a hostel at all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best college for chemical engineering.

content.Placements: Every year 75% of the students get placed in campus placements and the highest package is 9 LPA, the average package is 5 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA, top recruit companies are WIPRO, TCS, Cognizant, Pinnacle ltd, Welspun and many other pharmaceutical companies. Every student in our college does an internship in the summer after the end of 3-II SEM in companies like ONGC, NFC, IICT, and Dr Reddy's and the top roles offered are Executive and Technician.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are smart with basic amenities and we have Wi-Fi all over the campus and many core labs like FLUID MECHANICS, HEAT TRANSFER, MASS TRANSFER, MECHANICAL UNIT OPERATIONS, Physics Chemistry and a vast library with a lot of core and non-core jobs, The quality of hostel is good and the food is also okay and we have a private canteen and a health centre for our university free for all the students and a lot of sports and games as cricket, badminton, table tennis, basketball, volleyball, chess and carrom.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for chemical engineering.

content.Placements: More than 85% of students get placed every year. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, Pinnacle Ltd., L&T, and ITC. Everyone from the course does an internship at companies like ONGC, IICT, NFC, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, HPCL, etc. New companies are also added every year. The top roles offered in our course are executive, technician, and plant manager.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is Wi-Fi-enabled. All the classrooms are digital. We have a physics lab, a chemistry lab, a fluid mechanics lab, a heat transfer lab, a mass transfer lab, a process instrumentation lab, and a process simulation lab. We have a vast library with books and journals related to the course and various other books. The hostel is good in terms of infrastructure. The food in the mess is good. The canteen is also better in terms of food. The university has a PHC, and every student is treated for free. We play lots of games and sports like cricket, table tennis, chess, carrom, volleyball, basketball, kabaddi, badminton, etc.

highlights.summary: Arunachal University of Studies admissions 2026 are open for Diploma, UG, PG, and PhD courses. Candidates seeking admission can apply for their preferred course on the official university website. A few more updates are as follows:

reviews_list.review_title: If you love nature and peace, join us.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average, around 10 LPA for our department. As usual, if you can maintain your grades, you can get a really good placement. Other departments, such as nursing, pharmacy, B.Teach, M.A., or B.A., are also very active in placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, with a campus that includes hostels and a library. The girls' hostel is located inside the campus, and the faculty colony is also within the university grounds. The campus is quite pretty and beautiful, creating a good vibe, making it a good choice for nursing students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am very satisfied because of faculty. The placements, infrastructure and facilities really good.

review_content.Placements: Placements have been pretty great this year, We asked some of our seniors about the placements and they told us that the almost everyone got placed on campus. Top recruiting companies this year. Accenture recruited about 200 students while many other companies also recruited many of the students. The infrastructure of the college is really impressive. Everything is good and well-managed. Many facilities are provided within the campus so that we don't have to go outside the campus. There is almost everything a college student could ask for within the campus, whether it's related to academics, sports, food or fun. Faculty : Some of the faculty members of the college are good, and some are not. Most of the faculty members teach very well. They take care of the students' comfort zone. They use good teaching techniques so that the students can understand the concepts easily. They also provide industrial exposure.

review_summary.college_name: Arunachal University of Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: If you love nature and peace, join us.

content.Placements: Placements are average, around 10 LPA for our department. As usual, if you can maintain your grades, you can get a really good placement. Other departments, such as nursing, pharmacy, B.Teach, M.A., or B.A., are also very active in placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, with a campus that includes hostels and a library. The girls' hostel is located inside the campus, and the faculty colony is also within the university grounds. The campus is quite pretty and beautiful, creating a good vibe, making it a good choice for nursing students.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied because of faculty. The placements, infrastructure and facilities really good.

content.Placements: Placements have been pretty great this year, We asked some of our seniors about the placements and they told us that the almost everyone got placed on campus. Top recruiting companies this year. Accenture recruited about 200 students while many other companies also recruited many of the students. The infrastructure of the college is really impressive. Everything is good and well-managed. Many facilities are provided within the campus so that we don't have to go outside the campus. There is almost everything a college student could ask for within the campus, whether it's related to academics, sports, food or fun. Faculty : Some of the faculty members of the college are good, and some are not. Most of the faculty members teach very well. They take care of the students' comfort zone. They use good teaching techniques so that the students can understand the concepts easily. They also provide industrial exposure.

paragraphs: Arunachal University of Studies admissions are based on merit. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 25,000 - 5,40,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 30 months - 1 year. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.
