highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: SRM M.Ch. Bhawanipatna in a Nutshell.

review_content.Placements: It's a medical college so here placements don't play in role. We graduate with a medical/MBBS degree after 5.5 years. Each batch has 100 students and if all pass everyone gets the degree as an MBBS doctor who can practice anywhere and earn a decent amount.
review_content.Infrastructure: The academic block has excellent infrastructure with multiple lecture halls, seminar halls with well-equipped smart boards, air-conditioned, etc. There is 3-storeyed library with the availability of all 19 subject books. Library has AC, washrooms, etc. Hostels are good with proper facilities, separate boys and girls hostel. Each room is 3 bedded with bed, study table, chair, and one almira provided to each student. Mess problems do exist but get resolved too. Cafeteria is functional for tea breaks and snacks in the evening. Badminton courts, volleyball, and football courts are present.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of faculty members, good placement is there and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: All the students will be placed as it is a government college. The package range from 6-15LPA. Average package of 10LPA is offered. We get recruited in government hospital. 100% students get internship in our college and that too in government hospital. Top roles are tutors to HODS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good we have Wi-Fi, all the labs are well-equipped with every instruments The classroom have smart teaching system and projector is there. The library have every books necessary for the students. Hostel is well-equipped with B.Ed and cupboards and mess is also very good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Whereas, at PG level, PCTE Group of Institutes offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, MCA and M.Pharma. PCTE fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,03,600 to 3,92,800.

faqs.answer: A:    To join PCTE Group of Institutes – Campus -1 BTech programme, students must have completed Class 12 with Mathematics as a compulsory subject. review_content.Placements: My course is B.Pharma. In one batch, there are 100 students. They provide an internship after completing 3rd year of B.Pharma for 45 days in many pharma industries. Also, provide the placement with a good package, like 60 LPA in foreign countries. Internship is compulsory for every student, and they provide placement for many students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of campus 1 and campus 2 of PCTE is very nice. Classrooms, labs, and the library are very neat and clean. College also provides Wi-Fi facilities. In campus 2, there are 7 or 8 canteens where the food is mouth-watering. I'm on campus 1, and there are also some canteens. In the hostel, food and rooms are very clean.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college, but I think teachers should try to speak Punjabi.

review_content.Placements: Excellent college with the highest package of 40 LPA and the lowest around 4 LPA. There were various companies like Tata Motors and AI companies.

review_summary.college_name: PCTE Group of Institutes Campus-1 Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A growing campus with good placements and supportive faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were quite good especially for students from the computer science and IT branches. Many reputed companies like Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Accenture and HCL visit our campus every year for recruitment. Some product based companies also come, offer higher packages though they usually select few students. The average package offered was around 4 LPA to 5 LPA, while the highest salary was 15 LPA, depending on the company. The placement rate was also decent, with a majority of eligible students getting placed, particularly in IT roles.

individual_reviews.title: Best college in Ludhiana city.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are said to be very good. Many senior and graduated students have been placed at big companies like Sun Pharma. They also have a training cell for placement interviews, so that we can be selected in that interview and get a good job.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very big and clean. Regularly, maid staff clean classrooms daily. Every classroom has SMART board along with a projector. Washrooms are also cleaned and well maintained regularly. Infrastructure of this college is very good. I love it.

individual_reviews.title: PCTE Group of Institutions - The best college.

content.Placements: My course is B.Pharma. In one batch, there are 100 students. They provide an internship after completing 3rd year of B.Pharma for 45 days in many pharma industries. Also, provide the placement with a good package, like 60 LPA in foreign countries. Internship is compulsory for every student, and they provide placement for many students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of campus 1 and campus 2 of PCTE is very nice. Classrooms, labs, and the library are very neat and clean. College also provides Wi-Fi facilities. In campus 2, there are 7 or 8 canteens where the food is mouth-watering. I'm on campus 1, and there are also some canteens. In the hostel, food and rooms are very clean.

individual_reviews.title: Good college, but I think teachers should try to speak Punjabi.

content.Placements: Excellent college with the highest package of 40 LPA and the lowest around 4 LPA. There were various companies like Tata Motors and AI companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. I loved the college infrastructure. Many foreign students were living there. There were special arrangements for them. They had sports events in which they participated and enjoyed a lot. They enjoyed their life in our college. I think you must have tried it. I loved the college, but the buildings were becoming old and dusty. Anyways, my college was good.

individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure. I had a quite good experience. Life with friends is amazing here.

content.Placements: There are about 50 students in my batch. No average package is given in my course even though they didn't even care for Diploma batch students and that's very disappointing. Every degree or Diploma is the same. There is something in everything from which we can learn.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available but it is not for students. Labs, classrooms, and the library are nice. The infrastructure is good. Many facilities are available. The mess food is nice and it is available daily for even foreign students also. Many sports and games are available.

outlook.description:
As per the overall score, PCTE has been placed at a good position by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'BBA' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'BBA' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. reviews.review_heading: A growing campus with good placements and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college was quite good and well-maintained. Campus had a clean and green environment with good classroom facilities, proper lighting, and ventilation. Most of the classrooms were equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi connectivity. Computer labs were updated with the required software and decent internet speed, especially for students from technical branches. Library was spacious and had a good collection of textbooks, reference materials, and journals. There was also a digital...

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Ludhiana city.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very big and clean. Regularly, maid staff clean classrooms daily. Every classroom has SMART board along with a projector. Washrooms are also cleaned and well maintained regularly. Infrastructure of this college is very good. I love it.

reviews.review_heading: PCTE Group of Institutions - The best college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of campus 1 and campus 2 of PCTE is very nice. Classrooms, labs, and the library are very neat and clean. College also provides Wi-Fi facilities. In campus 2, there are 7 or 8 canteens where the food is mouth-watering. I'm on campus 1, and there are also some canteens. In the hostel, food and rooms are very clean.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, but I think teachers should try to speak Punjabi.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. I loved the college infrastructure. Many foreign students were living there. There were special arrangements for them. They had sports events in which they participated and enjoyed a lot. They enjoyed their life in our college. I think you must have tried it. I loved the college, but the buildings were becoming old and dusty. Anyways, my college was good.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure. I had a quite good experience. Life with friends is amazing here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but it is not for students. Labs, classrooms, and the library are nice. The infrastructure is good. Many facilities are available. The mess food is nice and it is available daily for even foreign students also. Many sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: PCTE Group of Institutes (A honest review).
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in my college is by far my most favourite thing here. The classes are really clean, big, and have a great environment. They have Wi-Fi as well. Labs are well-maintained. Also in hostels, they provide average food, I would rate it 6/10. Every facility like canteen and medical is there.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and faculty with great campus life and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our department has modern infrastructure with high-speed Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs and a well-maintained library. The hostel has decent rooms with 24/7 water and electricity. The mess serves hygienic food with a decent variety. The medical facilities are accessible and sports facilities include a gym, basketball court and football ground.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning environment with strong placement and vibrant camps life.
reviews.review_text: PCTE Groups of Institute offers excellent infrastructure and facilities to support academic and personal growth. Campus is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi. Our computer labs are also well-furnished with the latest hardware and software overall it provides the best facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is well-designed. Wi-Fi and labs in my college consist of more than 20 personal computers for students. Classrooms also have smart projectors which helps in understanding the concept easily. The food quality of hostel is superb.

reviews.review_heading: Good and affordable college in which all the things are good including infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about infrastructure of the college so it is clean and structured. We have many facilities like lifts from the ground to the top floor in every block and if I talk about the food in the mess it is delicious as well as nutritious that's all.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment because of nature. Good placements in HM, BTTM, and FD.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work on everybody's phones and laptops. Quality of food available in the mess is not so good. But the events make it fun when you have good people around, what matters is good company in college life. Library does have a good amount of books.

reviews.review_heading: All about PCTE Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Classrooms have screens for teaching and AC facilities, along with good sitting areas and lawns. We have 5-6 canteens within the campus, and for medical facilities, we have a pharmacy block where we can avail medicine in case of any emergency. Sports activities are also conducted almost every day.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure of the college develops but placements I think are not good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good as this PCTE college provides a lot of facilities. Moreover, it also organizes various types of events like Kishish which occurred in October where a lot of students gathered and various stalls have been held by various franchises.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The education provided is excellent with numerous events occurring throughout the semester, including regular classes and industrial visits. There are also opportunities for international internships lasting six months during which students can earn a substantial income. They provide proper study material and guidance by which we can learn more and more about the course.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best in our college. We have three campuses and we have access to all. Wi-Fi never works in our college at all. Wi-Fi is installed but never works. Our mobile network also goes down there because the range of the network is low but sometimes it works seamlessly.

review_summary.college_name: B. S. Anangpuria Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: Studying and acquiring knowledge at this college is good.

content.Placements: Placements are very good for our batch. Mostly, students are having the desired jobs according to their selection levels. Studies, behavior, and other opportunities to take care in all our work. Companies visited in our college are 3 for our batch. Role of a course is about medicine for safe use and not to misuse the people living with us, so they can understand and have knowledge about all side effects that they will suffer nowadays. I think this is the best course because only this medicine is made for life purposes.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at this college is average, not much too good, but it has all the facilities for students. Laboratory facilities are also good for us. Canteen is also safe for eating food good hygiene food is making in it. The provided sports are regularly held on every occasion, like volleyball, kabaddi, etc, and also give rewards to the winner.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are average and depend on students' hard work. Apollo and Cipla visit the college for campus placements. The highest salary package offered is 70 LPA. Students must score 70% to sit in an interview and get a job with an average salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: It is pretty good. We have a small campus. The canteen food is average but expensive.
content.Faculty: Exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 50%. Teachers are very supportive and always available to help students. They are knowledgeable. We can go for it if we study.

individual_reviews.title: I am not that much satisfied with the college, but it is good for learning and gaining knowledge.

content.Placements: Approximately 20-25% of students got placements through the college. The highest package is around 3 to 4 Lacs per annum, and the lowest is not defined. I only heard about Apollo Pharmacy, which recruits students from our college, and others have to find placements on their own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good and very neat and clean. The labs have proper equipment and chemicals provided, and classrooms are big with proper seating benches. The canteen is only available in the college, and the quality of food is not that much good as per the prices.

individual_reviews.title: It is the number one college in and around Faridabad, Ballabgarh. Take admission in this college.

content.Placements: Use of the college? S placement agency is open only to students in semester 6 and higher. Approximately twenty percent of students secure placement every year. There are more than enough colleges in your area with lower placement rates. Your college placement rate is good. Fortunate, you will not have to worry about placement. Students are easily placed based on their skill level and knowledge. The college is well connected within the industry, and many pharmacy corporations off campuses and internships on a regular basis, such as Apollo, Mankind, Cipla, etc.

individual_reviews.title: Take admission in this college.

content.Placements: Last year, students were eligible for placement, and a significant number of B.S.A students secured placements, with about 25-30% of students in B. Pharmacy getting placed. Sixth-semester students are eligible for placement. The package offered for our course depends on the students' knowledge and experience. Many companies come to the college to hire students, such as Sun Pharma, Apollo, and Mankind. The highest package is 3.5 LPA, the average is 1.7 LPA, and the lowest LPA is 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Recently, the pharmacy building was upgraded. Labs have all the chemicals and instruments required for experiments. AC is also available in the library and classrooms. The library has all the books related to our course, and the canteen offers good-quality food. A game room is available to students, where we can play games like table tennis and carrom during our free lectures.

college_info.intro:
Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University comprises 8 departments, including Science, Engineering, Humanities, Agriculture, and others. BTech, BSc, BA, and MBA are the flagship courses offered at HGU University.
MAHG University offers a full-time,three-year BSc programme at the UG level. The BSc programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Maths, Chemistry, Physics, Home Science, Environmental Sciences, and others. The MBA programme offered by the MAHGU is a four-year programme. It is offered in several specilisation such as Business Management and Hotel Management.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility & Selection Process

paragraphs: MAHGU admission 2025for UG and PG programmes is both merit and entrance-based.MAHGUoffers admissions in its technical and professional courses based on the score obtained in relevant entrance exams, while admissions in other programmes are done on the merit secured in the qualifying exam. The university offers an extensive range of courses at UG, PG and Diploma levels for students to pursue. MAHGU also conducts its own entrance exams for admission in certain programmes.

MAHGU offers admissions to its UG and PG courses based on national-level entrance exam score. Additionally, the university also offers direct admissions to students belonging to hilly region and rankholders of all central and state boards of India. Although admissions to most courses offered at MAHGU are done on entrance-basis, the university also accepts applicants on academic merit-basis or otherwise as deemed fit to fill the vacant seats. Find below the major highlights forMAHGU admissions:
MAHGU Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
32 (excluding specialisations)
Admission Status 2024
How to apply
https://hgu.ac.in/
UG courses: INR 20,500 - INR 4 lakh
PG courses: INR 25,500 - INR 1 lakh
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma| Certificate
Popular programmes
BA| BSc| MBA| LLM| PG Diploma

MAHGU course admission is subject to preset admission criteria. Admissions to MAHGU are accepted on both an entrance and merit basis. The unviersity offers a wide variety of programmes, such as BA, BSc, LLB, MBA, LLM, etc. Find tabulated below the eligibility and selection details for some of theMAHGU courses:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

MAHGU feevaries depending on the programme selected by the student. The total tuition fee of the UG, PG, Diploma and Certificate programmes offered at Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University ranges between INR 15,000 and INR 4 L. The table below contains details regarding the total tuition fee of the courses offered at MAHGU:
Course Name
Total Tuition Fees (Investment)
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change

MAHGU reserves31%of total seats for students who are permanent residents of Uttarakhand. Apart from this, the university also reserves seats for those belonging to SC/ST/OBC and PWD (with minimum disability to the extent of 40%). Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University also reserves some of the seats for NRIs, foreign nationals, PIOS. For further details regarding the seat reservation policy of the university, candidates can visit the official website of MAHGU or contact the admissions office of the university.

MAHGU admission process includes several steps. Interested candidates can visit the official website of MAHGU to obtain the application form. The admission process is held in both online and offline methods. The university accepts admissions on the basis of valid score obtained in the entrance exam conducted by the university Those who fulfill the specified eligibility criteria can follow the below-mentioned steps to completeMAHGU admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility ccriteria an visit the official website of MAHGU to fill the application form online. Alternatively, students can also download the prescribed form from the university's official website and after filling it out duly, send it to the Admission Cell of MAHGU, Uttarakhand and Information centers with a payment ofINR 1,000as a demand draft drawn in favour of "Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University" payable at Dehradun. Once the students are admitted to the University, an Anti-Ragging affidavit by students & parents both on stamp paper INR 10 duly attested by the oath commissioner/notary, has to be submitted.
Step 2: Selection Process

Once the registration is done, the candidates will be shortlisted based on the marks obtained in the entrance exams for the respective courses they chose. Admissions to the MBA programme are done on the basis of valid score obtained in MAT/ CAT while scores obtained in MAHGUEE are considered for admissions to other courses. The university also conducts group discussion followed by a round of personal interview to shortlist the candidates for certain programmes.
Step 3: Counselling and Fee Payment

The shortlisted candidates will then be called in for counselling based on which seats will be allotted. Once the seats have been allotted the students will have to pay the course fee to complete the admission process.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very nice and cool, it's in a hilly mountainous area. Wi-Fi service and labs are also available. Classrooms and the library are here properly, and everything is nearby and clean. Sports activities are organized from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: Make your future safe and secure with Maharaja Agarsen Himalayan Garhwal University, Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The campus is covered with a complete Wi-Fi network and a peaceful library with a neat and clean environment in the classrooms. There are grounds for playing sports like football, tennis, cricket, and more, with guidance from sports teachers who have international-level achievements. So, try this university.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the faculty members. It provided good placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good. The university is near the mountains, so the view is also good. The quality of the hostel and food is good. There are many indoor and outdoor sports. The campus is very outstanding and the nature near campus is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were big, but chairs and tables were not in good condition. There was no Wi-Fi. There was a library, but I visited it very rarely. A study room was provided where cleanliness was always maintained. The hostel mess and food were bad. The basketball ground was large.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel and classrooms were excellent, neat, and clean. Our college had lush greenery. Every day there was fresh air. Our college had excellent infrastructure. Everything was good.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure in the Himalayas of Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The facilities on the University campus were good. It has a good canteen where we get delicious food, and the sports ground is vast, and medical services are the best. Also, the hostel campus is fully-furnished, and it has air-conditioned rooms. The washrooms are clean and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and the campus is clean. Classrooms have air-conditioners, and Wi-Fi connection is available for students on the campus. Labs are available for practicals, which are kept clean and maintained. Various apparatus and instruments are available for experiments. Sports and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. The hostel is located in a hill area with very good nature and fresh air. Classrooms, labs, library and Wi-Fi are very good. The hostel is very good. The food served in a mess is the best, and it tastes like homemade food. Sports are very important in university, and it provides opportunities for sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied, and you should take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Labs are well maintained and have all apparatus for experiments. Wi-Fi is also available and has average speed. The mess and canteen are also available. Medical facilities and sports, indoor and outdoor games, are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent place for studying.
reviews.review_text: They had excellent facilities in terms of infrastructure. The role of the administration was really good. It was a hygienic place. Everything in the college was really amazing. If I talk about facilities, they had good and hygienic places where we could have food.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very knowledgeable. It is the best college for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: A total of 500 students were placed in my college. The lowest package offered by my college was 3 LPA and the highest package offered was 20 LPA. Google, Microsoft, Amazon, etc., recruited students. Around 60% of students got internships. Roles offered included HR, manager, and assistant manager. Many different types of companies are recruited on college campuses. It ranges from large tech giants like Google, Microsoft, and Amazon to smaller, specialized businesses. Industries like finance, cons...

reviews.review_heading: There are 100% job placements in this college in the top brands.
reviews.review_text: There were lots of facilities in our college. Like all the major departments, live practical facility which is most valuable things for us. All infrastructure was very good and smooth.

reviews.review_heading: In terms of infrastructure, I'm dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text:
1) Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library are there. There are good teachers to support in every stream. 
2) The quality of food is quite good in hostel. Canteen's food is good and well maintained. Sports and games are not there. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, you can take admission, but you will have to learn many things on your own.
reviews.review_text: The library here is good, and Wi-Fi is never a problem. The classrooms are also good. In the hostel, you can eat in the mess or ask for it from outside as per your wish. The hostel rooms are average. The labs here are also the best, but we can say that they are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is a bit run-down, but manageable with good professors.

review_content.Placements: The course of MBBS from my batch is yet to have placements, but in the long run, I guess it is 100%. The package varies on the type of work you are doing, but for simple MBBS Doctors with no further studies, it will be up to 70k-1.2L. Internship is 100%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the lecture hall is fine, there is AC and a projector, so no complaints about it, where wi-fi labs and library are available. The 1st and 2nd Year hostels are really good with attached bathrooms, but the main hostel is a little bit run-down. Medical facilities are top-notch, not much sports and games are available, and the mess and canteen are okay.

reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities, supportive teachers, fair exams, and strong practical exposure in nursing.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 60-70% of students were placed, mostly in hospitals, NGOs, and community health centers. In our course, the top roles offered are Staff Nurse, Nursing Officer, Clinical Instructor, and positions in hospitals, community health centers, and government health schemes. Many students also get opportunities as ICU nurses, OT nurses, award in charge, and some pursue higher studies like M.Sc. Nursing or join as tutors in nursing colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities like well-equipped classrooms, a library with updated nursing and medical books, hostel facilities, and a supportive faculty team. Clinical exposure is also given through hospital training. The facilities in our college are well-maintained and student-friendly. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and some are equipped with smart boards to make learning interactive.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely marvelous college CG top state medical college.

review_content.Placements: There are 230 students in each batch. Internships are offered at the associated hospital. It offers bond posting from CG government. Top-notch professors are there, and each expert in their field. It produced many great doctors who are serving all across India. Good to be part of this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All basic facilities are available. It has an auditorium, all labs, library, canteen, and hostel. We have two dissection halls. We have hematology lab, human lab, Biochemistry UG lab, advanced research laboratory, chemistry lab, microbiology lab, pathology lab, pharmacology lab, and FMT autopsy room. All 19 branches are present at hospital.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is the best nursing college.

review_content.Placements: After completion, the college provides a campus placement to students with the best package. So, you can get the best job offer just after completing your course. Nursing is such a beautiful course to get a job sooner, and to provide services to all.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are suitable. It's good to survive 4 years of nursing. The mess is a very hygienic condition. Classrooms are comfortable and provide a suitable environment for students in which they can study effectively. There is no term of ragging. We follow the phenomenon that ragging is a crime.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My college is fairly good, and you can consider applying here. Placement opportunities are decent.

review_content.Placements: 20% of students were placed in Computer Science Engineering. The average package offered in our course ranges from 4 to 5 LPA. Companies like Infosys and Wipro participate in placements. However, only 5 to 6% of students secured internships. Placement opportunities are fairly good; some students receive packages, but many do not.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are good. The library provides a conducive atmosphere for studying. All facilities are provided to every student at our college. It has a positive environment for studying overall, with a quiet lab atmosphere.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best for placements. It lacks infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 100% of students get placements after completion of the MBBS course because there is a lack of healthcare professionals in Chhattisgarh. Basically, it is a compulsory bond service of 2 years which is recruited by the Chhattisgarh government. Internships are done in the medical college hospital itself, which is a part of the course. After bond service, we are recruited by any private or government hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are in total 19 departments. There are 5 lecture theatres and several demo rooms. Each non-clinical department has its own lab. There is no Wi-Fi. There is an air-conditioned central library for issuing books. Some departments have their own library. It has an air-conditioned study room. Boys hostel is not too good but okay from a hosteller's perspective. There are 2 mess facilities and we can choose to eat from anyone. Bathrooms are not good. There are water coolers for drinking water. There is a badminton court, a playground, a park, a basketball court, and an auditorium.

review_summary.college_name: Pt. Deendayal Upadhyay Memorial Health Sciences and Ayush University, Raipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is a bit run-down, but manageable with good professors.

content.Placements: The course of MBBS from my batch is yet to have placements, but in the long run, I guess it is 100%. The package varies on the type of work you are doing, but for simple MBBS Doctors with no further studies, it will be up to 70k-1.2L. Internship is 100%.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the lecture hall is fine, there is AC and a projector, so no complaints about it, where wi-fi labs and library are available. The 1st and 2nd Year hostels are really good with attached bathrooms, but the main hostel is a little bit run-down. Medical facilities are top-notch, not much sports and games are available, and the mess and canteen are okay.

individual_reviews.title: Good facilities, supportive teachers, fair exams, and strong practical exposure in nursing.

content.Placements: Nearly 60-70% of students were placed, mostly in hospitals, NGOs, and community health centers. In our course, the top roles offered are Staff Nurse, Nursing Officer, Clinical Instructor, and positions in hospitals, community health centers, and government health schemes. Many students also get opportunities as ICU nurses, OT nurses, award in charge, and some pursue higher studies like M.Sc. Nursing or join as tutors in nursing colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities like well-equipped classrooms, a library with updated nursing and medical books, hostel facilities, and a supportive faculty team. Clinical exposure is also given through hospital training. The facilities in our college are well-maintained and student-friendly. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and some are equipped with smart boards to make learning interactive.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely marvelous college CG top state medical college.

content.Placements: There are 230 students in each batch. Internships are offered at the associated hospital. It offers bond posting from CG government. Top-notch professors are there, and each expert in their field. It produced many great doctors who are serving all across India. Good to be part of this college.
content.Infrastructure: All basic facilities are available. It has an auditorium, all labs, library, canteen, and hostel. We have two dissection halls. We have hematology lab, human lab, Biochemistry UG lab, advanced research laboratory, chemistry lab, microbiology lab, pathology lab, pharmacology lab, and FMT autopsy room. All 19 branches are present at hospital.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best nursing college.

content.Placements: After completion, the college provides a campus placement to students with the best package. So, you can get the best job offer just after completing your course. Nursing is such a beautiful course to get a job sooner, and to provide services to all.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are suitable. It's good to survive 4 years of nursing. The mess is a very hygienic condition. Classrooms are comfortable and provide a suitable environment for students in which they can study effectively. There is no term of ragging. We follow the phenomenon that ragging is a crime.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college is fairly good, and you can consider applying here. Placement opportunities are decent.

content.Placements: 20% of students were placed in Computer Science Engineering. The average package offered in our course ranges from 4 to 5 LPA. Companies like Infosys and Wipro participate in placements. However, only 5 to 6% of students secured internships. Placement opportunities are fairly good; some students receive packages, but many do not.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are good. The library provides a conducive atmosphere for studying. All facilities are provided to every student at our college. It has a positive environment for studying overall, with a quiet lab atmosphere.

reviews_list.review_title: The college needs a lot of improvement.

review_content.Placements: There are absolutely no placements provided by the college. Most of the students in my batch are not placed anywhere. The companies recruiting are very few in number. Only a handful of students are placed, and that too with the minimum salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is poor. There are not proper classrooms provided to the pharmacy department. These classrooms are not fully equipped, have no AC, and poor-quality desks. No auditorium is provided to the pharmacy department. Events are organized in the engineering department. Laboratories are also not up to the mark.

reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges.

review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-structured classrooms and labs. Free Wi-Fi is available in our college. Restrooms are neat. The hostel provides food. The food served in the hostel is average. Sports and games are available in our college. All classrooms and labs are maintained and clean.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very good, helpful, and qualified. Their teaching quality is very good. Most of them have given GPAT. Semester exams are difficult for students who don't study at all. Exams are not difficult for average students.

The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Galgotias College of Pharmacyoffers courses at UG levels. Some of the courses include B.Pharma and UG Diploma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years.

courses_data.name: Galgotias College of Pharmacy B.Pharma Admission 2025

faqs.question: How can I get into Galgotias College of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer: Galgotias College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityUG DiplomaThe minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.B.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Mathematics from any recognised Board/Council.

reviews.review_heading: The college needs a lot of improvement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. There are not proper classrooms provided to the pharmacy department. These classrooms are not fully equipped, have no AC, and poor-quality desks. No auditorium is provided to the pharmacy department. Events are organized in the engineering department. Laboratories are also not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-structured classrooms and labs. Free Wi-Fi is available in our college. Restrooms are neat. The hostel provides food. The food served in the hostel is average. Sports and games are available in our college. All classrooms and labs are maintained and clean.
